flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Daemen University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $35.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Daemen University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $35.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Daemen University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Daemen University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (43.0% → 47.3%).
